content: We can hypothesize that integrating an ICM curiosity module into the ACP Harness agent runtime execution model will enable autonomous pipeline optimization: the intrinsic reward from ICM will drive the ACP Harness agent to explore under-tested failure strategy combinations, rollback workflows, and parallel execution scheduling configurations that static manual design would never uncover, without requiring labeled data on production pipeline performance. This creates a self-improving CI/CD runtime that adapts its own execution logic to reduce unplanned failures over time.
source_topics: ACP harness agent runtime execution model
trigger_topic: ACP harness agent runtime execution model
